notes: Approved 2026-05-10. Architecture: in-JVM HTTP MCP server via JDK HttpServer, hand-rolled JSON-RPC. Streaming via stream-json + --include-partial-messages. Pre-PRD C-0 spike PASSED: HTTP transport works (4.5s/turn), --tools "" preserves MCP tools, CLI 2.1.133 confirmed. C-0 descoped to auth-stderr capture only. C-12 added (system-prompt cost-reduction spike). Default model = sonnet (was opus).
